name: lucid
description: Clarify ambiguous requests into selectable branches and executable briefs.

interface.longDescription: Lucid complements Restate. Use branch when a request can be interpreted multiple ways and the user needs selectable options. Use brief after choices are made to capture objective, scope, decisions, requirements, success criteria, and blocking or non-blocking open questions.
defaultPrompt: Use lucid:branch to split this request into options
Use lucid:brief to turn these decisions into an execution brief
